stream_entries.content: Sam and I reviewed the Atlas deploy checklist this morning.
We focused on the rollback path and the production stability risks.
The checklist still needs one more Atlas verification step.
I captured the missing deploy verification and the rollback reminder.
Later we also talked about pgvector indexing latency on the retrieval pipeline.
We agreed to rebuild the pgvector index and benchmark the indexing fix.

scripted_episodes.title: Sam reviewed the Atlas deploy checklist
scripted_episodes.narrative: Sam and I reviewed the Atlas deploy checklist and the rollback path. We focused on production stability and the missing verification step.

scripted_episodes.title: pgvector indexing latency follow-up
scripted_episodes.narrative: We discussed pgvector indexing latency in the retrieval pipeline. The plan was to rebuild the index and benchmark the fix.
